---
title: Theme Comparator
description: Side-by-side comparison of Visor themes — preview any two themes simultaneously across the full component library.
---

import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

The Theme Comparator renders the full Visor component library side-by-side under two themes simultaneously. Use it to evaluate how a new theme holds up across every component before shipping.

## What it does

- **Side-by-side preview** — Compare any two installed themes across all components at once
- **Full component coverage** — Every component in the Visor library is rendered in both themes
- **Token diff** — See which tokens differ between the two selected themes

<a href="/compare">
  <Button style={{ marginTop: '1rem' }}>Launch Theme Comparator →</Button>
</a>
